data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-24T00:05 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

Next: Check inbox for work assignments: gt mail inbox

input.description: Show patrol wisp details and steps

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-7yeaxd [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-24 · Updated: 2026-02-23

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4tl900: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-j39tbu: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-lyhudh: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ms3fvk: Check for orphaned processes ● P2

content.content:
○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-j39tbu · Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages   [● P2 · OPEN]
Type: task
Created: 2026-02-24 · Updated: 2026-02-24

DESCRIPTION
Check deacon inbox for messages.

**Process in priority order:**
1. LIFECYCLE requests (cycle/restart/shutdown) → execute immediately
2. TIMER callbacks → fire if time has passed
3. HANDOFF messages → read for context, then delete
4. General messages → handle as appropriate

**Commands:**
- `gt mail inbox`
- `gt mail read <id>`
- `gt mail delete <id>` (ALWAYS delete after handling)


PARENT
  ↑ ? skogtown-wisp-wisp-7yeaxd: (EPIC) mol-deacon-patrol ● P2

BLOCKS
  ← ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4tl900: Scan agent health ● P2

input.description: Show next step: scan agent health

content.content:
○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4tl900 · Scan agent health   [● P2 · OPEN]
Type: task
Created: 2026-02-24 · Updated: 2026-02-24

DESCRIPTION
Check that Mayor and Witnesses are alive and responsive.

**Commands:**
- `gt deacon heartbeat` (update own heartbeat)
- `gt mayor status` (check mayor)
- `gt rig list` (check rig/witness status)

**If agent is down:**
1. Attempt restart (e.g., `gt mayor start`)
2. Log the remediation
3. If fails after 3 attempts → escalate


PARENT
  ↑ ? skogtown-wisp-wisp-7yeaxd: (EPIC) mol-deacon-patrol ● P2

DEPENDS ON
  → ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-j39tbu: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2

BLOCKS
  ← ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ms3fvk: Check for orphaned processes ● P2

content.content:
○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ms3fvk · Check for orphaned processes   [● P2 · OPEN]
Type: task
Created: 2026-02-24 · Updated: 2026-02-24

DESCRIPTION
Detect orphaned polecat sessions or stuck processes.

**Commands:**
- `gt orphans` (find orphaned work)
- `gt cleanup --dry-run` (check for stale sessions)

**If orphans found:**
- Log them
- Attempt cleanup if safe


PARENT
  ↑ ? skogtown-wisp-wisp-7yeaxd: (EPIC) mol-deacon-patrol ● P2

DEPENDS ON

Usage:
  gt orphans [flags]
  gt orphans [command]

Available Commands:
  kill        Remove all orphans (commits and processes)
  procs       Manage orphaned Claude processes

Flags:
      --all          Show all orphans (no date filter)
      --days int     Show orphans from last N days (default 7)

      --rig string   Target rig name (required when not in a rig directory)
